text.title: Competitive Intelligence Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Competitive Intelligence methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: watchlist-init
step.action: Compile watchlist.yaml; classify each URL by signal type + cadence.

step.name: collect
step.action: Haiku polls URLs, emits one event per delta into NDJSON.

step.name: classify
step.action: Haiku/Sonnet tags events as pricing|feature|hire|funding|review|content; discards noise.

step.name: synthesize-weekly
step.action: Sonnet clusters per competitor; writes weekly digest with event_id citations.

step.name: threat-assess
step.action: Opus scores threats 1-5; refuses with <3 cited events per claim.

step.name: battlecard-regenerate
step.action: Sonnet regenerates per-competitor battlecard; stamps TTL 14d.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to publish if TTL>14d or fact-checker fails.

step.name: fact-check
step.action: Sonnet HEAD-requests every cited URL; rejects 4xx/5xx; flags unsourced claims.
step.decision-gate: If fail, return to upstream step; do not distribute.
